entries.title: Resume full autonomous operation after 7-day gap. Vitoshi granted write access to gengar workspace (chown gengar:vitoshi + g+w).
entries.desc: Fastest path to resume. Full write access without service restart.

entries.title: Build sample Agency Receipt PDF as primary cold email attachment. HTML->PDF, cream/ink/amber receipt aesthetic.
entries.desc: The PDF IS the pitch. Recipient sees $2,835 value delivered, $350 suggested invoice. No explanation needed.

entries.title: Build lead list via custom Go scraper targeting n8n + Zapier directories. Skip Apollo API (free tier 403 on people search).
entries.desc: Scraper runs autonomously, no credit caps. Apollo/Hunter reserved as enrichment.

entries.title: Set up email infrastructure — SPF, DKIM, DMARC on agencyreceipt.com. Use Smartlead for cold email sequencing.
entries.desc: Deliverability is the #1 cold email kill factor. All DNS checks green before sending a single email. Smartlead free tier covers first 250 sends.

entries.title: Build agencyreceipt.com as the product domain and deploy landing page to Vercel.
entries.desc: Own domain = credibility in cold email. Vercel free tier = $0 cost. Domain acquired via existing registrar.

entries.title: Lock niche = AI-automation agency ops layer (n8n/Make/GHL). Wedge = free weekly "Agency Receipt" PDF for first 5 agencies in exchange for testimonial + call. No Stripe until 3 verbal yeses on $99/mo.
entries.desc: Highest combined score, AI-adjacent (Vitoshi network leverage), zero build cost, daily self-identifying buyers on r/n8n/r/AI_Agents/r/GoHighLevel. Free wedge avoids premature pricing; the discovery call IS the product because I'll surface the real $300/mo SaaS pain (silent-failure detection) from the conversation.

entries.title: Hunt B2B SaaS / productized-service niche. Validate before build. Concierge MVP path.
entries.desc: Recurring revenue + technical buyer + Vitoshi's network = unfair distribution. SaaS has highest LTV/CAC ceiling. Concierge MVP minimizes build before signal.
